about.title: «Haykadzor Secondary School» SNCO
about.subtitle: About our school
about.body:
«Haykadzor Secondary School» SNCO is located in Haykadzor village, Ani community, Shirak marz of the Republic of Armenia. It implements general secondary education programs and is a state educational institution.

Basic information:
Address: Shirak marz, Ani community, Haykadzor village, 4th street, building 1.
Phone numbers:
+374 (77) 06-56-88
+374 (93) 03-07-72
Email: haykadzor@schools.am
Principal: Karen Gevorgyan (acting principal).
Staff: The school has approximately 27 employees.

The school actively participates in various educational programs, including the «ImDproc» (MySchool) platform, and regularly publishes its curricula and budgets.

Would you like to learn about the school's vacant positions or admission procedures?

adminDashboard.title: Admin Dashboard
adminDashboard.dashboardLead: Manage school content in one place — same look as the public site.
adminDashboard.aboutContentLanguageHint: Pick a language, edit the fields below, then save — only that language is updated.
adminDashboard.aboutStoredVersionsCaption: All three languages are kept separately. Current saved content:
adminDashboard.aboutVersionEmpty: empty (site uses default translation for that language)
adminDashboard.aboutClientPreviewNote: This matches the public About page. Empty saved fields use the built-in translation for that language.
adminDashboard.aboutSavedFieldsLead: Saved text for this language (leave empty to keep using the translation above):
adminDashboard.documentsSectionLead: Upload a PDF, choose the document category, and add a title and short description.
adminDashboard.uploadPdfHint: PDF only — drag & drop or click to choose a file.
adminDashboard.uploadPdfOptional: Optional — attach a PDF to this announcement.
adminDashboard.announcementsSectionLead: Choose vacant positions or admission, add text, and optionally attach a PDF.
